content:
💡 arcade_ai | Dart
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a unified and user-friendly mobile interface for interacting with a wide range of Large Language Models from different providers on Android devices.
✨ Key Features: • 12 built-in providers + custom endpoint support • Streaming responses • Reasoning view for complex models • Vision capabilities (image input) • Model comparison feature
📖 Summary: Arcade AI is a universal Android chat client that connects to multiple Large Language Models (LLMs) from various providers. It offers a fluid, secure, and customizable interface for interacting with different AI models, including global, regional, and local options.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
